scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.postinstall: npm run postinstall --workspace server && npm run fonts --workspace client
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:push --workspace server && npm run db:seed --workspace server
